description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular layout. The exterior is predominantly white, featuring large windows and multiple outdoor living spaces, including a patio and a pool area. The property is surrounded by lush greenery and mature trees, providing privacy and a natural aesthetic. The house includes a driveway, a front yard with a walkway, and a backyard with a pool and seating area. The architectural design emphasizes open spaces and seamless indoor-outdoor transitions, with expansive glass doors and minimalistic landscaping. The floor plan is visible in one view, indicating a spacious and well-organized interior layout.
description: A modern, two-story white house with a flat roof, large windows, and outdoor living spaces surrounded by trees and greenery.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the driveway, front yard, main entrance, and surrounding trees.
description_view_1: Side elevation with a clear view of the flat roof, large windows, and the floor plan layout in the foreground.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the backyard, pool area, and outdoor seating, framed by dense trees.
description_view_3: Side/rear view focusing on the pool, patio, and extensive greenery along the property boundary.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, small porch, and direct walkway, flanked by landscaping and trees.
